info.title: AJVC Portfolio Intelligence Dashboard API
info.description:
## 🚀 AJVC Portfolio Intelligence Dashboard - Backend API

A comprehensive **portfolio management system** for venture capital firms to track portfolio companies,
analyze project execution, monitor commitments, and gain AI-powered insights from meeting notes.

### Key Features

* **📊 Company Management**: Track portfolio companies with investment details and status
* **📈 Gantt Layer Analytics**: Pull data from Google Sheets and compute execution KPIs
* **📝 AI-Powered Meeting Analysis**: Upload DOCX meeting notes for automatic parsing with Google Gemini
* **✅ Commitment Tracking**: Automatically extract and track actionable commitments from meetings
* **🔒 Secure Authentication**: JWT-based authentication for all protected endpoints

### Tech Stack

* **FastAPI** for high-performance async API
* **PostgreSQL** with SQLAlchemy ORM
* **Google Gemini AI** for intelligent meeting parsing
* **Google Sheets API** for Gantt data integration
* **JWT Authentication** for secure access

### Getting Started

1. Authenticate via `/api/v1/auth/login` to get a JWT token
2. Include the token in the `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header
3. Create or select a company via `/api/v1/companies`
4. Upload meeting notes or pull Gantt data for analysis

### API Versioning

Current version: **v1.0.0** - All endpoints are prefixed with `/api/v1`

get.description:
Return one row per company with stage counts + KPI scores from their
latest GanttSnapshot. Companies with no snapshot are included with
zero counts and null KPIs.

post.description:
Upload a DOCX file containing ONE meeting's notes.
Parses the meeting and stores in database.

TEST ENDPOINT: Upload Meeting_Dump.docx with multiple meetings.
This is for testing only. Production uses single meeting uploads.

get.description: List all meetings for a company, ordered by date descending.

List commitments for a company.
Sorted with overdue first, then by due date.

Query params:
- status_filter: Filter by status (open, due-soon, overdue, resolved)

action.title: Action
action.description: Description of the action to be taken

meeting_id.title: Meeting Id
meeting_id.description: Meeting where this commitment was mentioned

days_overdue.title: Days Overdue
days_overdue.description: Number of days overdue (only for overdue commitments)

origin_meeting_id.title: Origin Meeting Id
origin_meeting_id.description: Meeting where this commitment was originally created

resolved_in_meeting_id.title: Resolved In Meeting Id
resolved_in_meeting_id.description: Meeting where this commitment was resolved

resolved_at.title: Resolved At
resolved_at.description: Timestamp when commitment was marked as resolved

stage.title: Stage
stage.description: Investment stage (e.g., Seed, Series A, Series B)

sheets_url.title: Sheets Url
sheets_url.description: Google Sheets URL for Gantt chart data

stage.title: Stage
stage.description: Investment stage (e.g., Seed, Series A, Series B)

sheets_url.title: Sheets Url
sheets_url.description: Google Sheets URL for Gantt chart data

stage_changes.title: Stage Changes
stage_changes.description: Tasks that changed stage since last snapshot

sheets_url.title: Sheets Url
sheets_url.description: Google Sheets URL to pull from (overrides company's default)

task_count.title: Task Count
task_count.description: Total number of tasks in the snapshot

meeting_date.title: Meeting Date
meeting_date.description: Date when the meeting took place

raw_notes.title: Raw Notes
examples: Meeting with CEO to discuss Q1 roadmap...

ai_summary.title: Ai Summary
ai_summary.description: AI-generated summary of the meeting (JSON array of strings)

decisions.title: Decisions
decisions.description: Key decisions made during the meeting (JSON array)

gap_assessment.title: Gap Assessment
gap_assessment.description: Assessment of gaps between expectations and reality

alignment_points.title: Alignment Points
alignment_points.description: Points of alignment between VC and founder (JSON array)

commitments.title: Commitments
commitments.description: Commitments extracted from meeting (deprecated - use commitments endpoint)

sentiment.title: Sentiment
sentiment.description: Overall sentiment score (1-5, where 1=very negative, 5=very positive)

parsed_at.title: Parsed At
parsed_at.description: Timestamp when AI parsing was completed

meetings_processed.title: Meetings Processed
meetings_processed.description: Number of meetings processed from the dump file

meeting_date.title: Meeting Date
meeting_date.description: Date of the meeting in ISO format

commitments_count.title: Commitments Count
commitments_count.description: Number of commitments extracted from the meeting

yet_to_start.title: Yet To Start
yet_to_start.description: Count of tasks not yet started

done_but_delayed.title: Done But Delayed
done_but_delayed.description: Count of tasks completed but delayed

has_snapshot.title: Has Snapshot
has_snapshot.description: Whether company has any Gantt snapshots

tags.name: health
tags.description: Health check endpoints for monitoring service availability.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Authentication endpoints for user login and token management.

tags.name: companies
tags.description: Manage portfolio companies including creation, retrieval, updates, and deletion. Companies are the core entities in the system, representing portfolio investments.

tags.name: gantt
tags.description: Gantt chart data management including pulling data from Google Sheets, computing KPIs (shipping velocity, execution speed, planning depth), generating diffs between snapshots, and providing portfolio overview analytics.

tags.name: meetings
tags.description: Meeting notes management including DOCX upload, AI-powered parsing with Gemini, automatic commitment extraction, and meeting history retrieval. Meetings are parsed to extract summaries, decisions, risks, and actionable commitments.

tags.name: commitments
tags.description: Commitment tracking and status management. Commitments are actionable items extracted from meetings with due dates, assignees, and automatic status updates (open, due-soon, overdue, resolved).
